## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Manually tested against running stack

## Checklist
- [ ] `make vet` passes
- [ ] No new global state introduced
- [ ] Follows handler/service/response conventions from CLAUDE.md
- [ ] PR description explains *why*, not just *what*
